name: Arcotech Limited
summary: Arcotech Limited manufactures and supplies non-ferrous engineering products primarily in India. The company offers non-ferrous alloy products, including copper, brass, phosphor bronze, nickel silver, nickel brass, cupro nickel, aluminum bronze, tin bearing copper, silver bearing copper, etc. in the form of semis, such as ingots, strips, sheets, plates, foils, bus bars, and rods, as well as coin blanks, lugs, key blanks, terminals, connectors, etc. It also offers HSS, carbide, and graphite tools; and value-added services, including welding, riveting, tapping, and mechanical assembly services. The company serves various manufacturers of electronic, electrical/power transmission, switchgear, HT cables, auto components, radiators, keys and locks, zippers, sanitary fittings, torches, and coins. Arcotech Limited also exports its products to approximately 21 countries in Asia, Africa, North America, South America, Australia, and Europe. The company was incorporated in 1981 and is based in Haryana, India.
